meaning: n.阿托恩(古埃及信奉的太阳神)
examples: Aton just smirked and laid his CARDS on the table.
I am Christ Michael Aton and on these words I place my approval.
He said that Aton could even use his own deck, as long as it wasn't marked.

UniCredit Aton, a Moscow investment bank, opined in February that AES was selling at as much as a 50% discount.
